title: Valin (disambiguation)
content:
'''Valin''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Valin Hess]]''', a [[human]] [[Gender|male]] [[officer]] who served the [[Galactic Empire]] and the [[Morak Imperial remnants]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*'''[[Valin Draco]]''', a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] alive during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Valin Horn]]''', human Jedi Knight alive during the years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Hal Horn]]''', born Valin Halcyon, a survivor of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] and member of the [[Corellian Security Force]]

*

*
{{Disambig}}
